1→import { useState } from 'react'
     2→import { useParams, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'
     3→import {
     4→  Container,
     5→  Title,
     6→  Text,
     7→  Group,
     8→  Badge,
     9→  Stack,
    10→  Button,
    11→  Card,
    12→  TagsInput,
    13→  Loader,
    14→  Anchor,
    15→  Box,
    16→} from '@mantine/core'
    17→import { ArrowLeft, ExternalLink } from 'lucide-react'
    18→import { graphql } from 'gql.tada'
    19→import { useQuery, useMutation } from '@/lib/graphql'
    20→
    21→interface ItemData {
    22→  item: {
    23→    id: string
    24→    type: string
    25→    status: string
    26→    sensitivity: string
    27→    title: string | null
    28→    contentText: string | null
    29→    contentUrl: string | null
    30→    tags: string[]
    31→    metadata: unknown
    32→    autoMetadata: unknown
    33→    source: string
    34→    sourceUrl: string | null
    35→    createdAt: string
    36→    updatedAt: string
    37→    capturedAt: string
    38→  } | null
    39→}
    40→
    41→interface TagItemData {
    42→  tagItem: {
    43→    id: string
    44→    tags: string[]
    45→  }
    46→}
    47→
    48→const ItemQuery = graphql(`
    49→  query Item($id: ID!) {
    50→    item(id: $id) {
    51→      id
    52→      type
    53→      status
    54→      sensitivity
    55→      title
    56→      contentText
    57→      contentUrl
    58→      tags
    59→      metadata
    60→      autoMetadata
    61→      source
    62→      sourceUrl
    63→      createdAt
    64→      updatedAt
    65→      capturedAt
    66→    }
    67→  }
    68→`)
    69→
    70→const TagItemMutation = graphql(`
    71→  mutation TagItem($id: ID!, $tags: [String!]!) {
    72→    tagItem(id: $id, tags: $tags) {
    73→      id
    74→      tags
    75→    }
    76→  }
    77→`)
    78→
    79→const TYPE_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {
    80→  BOOKMARK: 'blue',
    81→  TEXT_NOTE: 'green',
    82→  VOICE_NOTE: 'orange',
    83→  DRIVE_DOC: 'violet',
    84→  HIGHLIGHT: 'yellow',
    85→  FILE: 'gray',
    86→}
    87→
    88→const STATUS_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {
    89→  PENDING: 'yellow',
    90→  PROCESSING: 'blue',
    91→  READY: 'green',
    92→  ERROR: 'red',
    93→}
    94→
    95→function formatType(type: string): string {
    96→  return type.replace(/_/g, ' ').toLowerCase()
    97→}
    98→
    99→function formatDate(dateStr: string): string {
   100→  return new Date(dateStr).toLocaleString()
   101→}
   102→
   103→export function ItemDetail() {
   104→  const { id } = useParams<{ id: string }>()
   105→  const navigate = useNavigate()
   106→  const [editingTags, setEditingTags] = useState(false)
   107→  const [tagValues, setTagValues] = useState<string[]>([])
   108→
   109→  const [result] = useQuery<ItemData>({
   110→    query: ItemQuery,
   111→    variables: { id: id! },
   112→    pause: !id,
   113→  })
   114→
   115→  const [tagResult, executeMutation] = useMutation<TagItemData>(TagItemMutation)
   116→
   117→  const item = result.data?.item
   118→
   119→  function startEditTags() {
   120→    if (item) {
   121→      setTagValues([...item.tags])
   122→      setEditingTags(true)
   123→    }
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  async function saveTags() {
   127→    if (!item) return
   128→    await executeMutation({ id: item.id, tags: tagValues })
   129→    setEditingTags(false)
   130→  }
   131→
   132→  if (result.fetching) {
   133→    return (
   134→      <Container size="md" py="xl">
   135→        <Loader size="sm" />
   136→      </Container>
   137→    )
   138→  }
   139→
   140→  if (result.error) {
   141→    return (
   142→      <Container size="md" py="xl">
   143→        <Text c="red">{result.error.message}</Text>
   144→      </Container>
   145→    )
   146→  }
   147→
   148→  if (!item) {
   149→    return (
   150→      <Container size="md" py="xl">
   151→        <Text c="dimmed">Item not found.</Text>
   152→      </Container>
   153→    )
   154→  }
   155→
   156→  return (
   157→    <Container size="md" py="xl">
   158→      <Stack gap="lg">
   159→        {/* Back navigation */}
   160→        <Button
   161→          variant="subtle"
   162→          leftSection={<ArrowLeft size={16} />}
   163→          onClick={() => navigate(-1)}
   164→          style={{ alignSelf: 'flex-start' }}
   165→          size="sm"
   166→        >
   167→          Back
   168→        </Button>
   169→
   170→        {/* Header */}
   171→        <Group justify="space-between" align="flex-start">
   172→          <Title order={2} style={{ flex: 1 }}>
   173→            {item.title ?? 'Untitled'}
   174→          </Title>
   175→          <Group gap="xs">
   176→            <Badge color={TYPE_COLORS[item.type] ?? 'gray'} variant="light">
   177→              {formatType(item.type)}
   178→            </Badge>
   179→            <Badge color={STATUS_COLORS[item.status] ?? 'gray'} variant="dot">
   180→              {item.status.toLowerCase()}
   181→            </Badge>
   182→          </Group>
   183→        </Group>
   184→
   185→        {/* Source URL for bookmarks */}
   186→        {item.sourceUrl && (
   187→          <Anchor href={item.sourceUrl} target="_blank" fz="sm">
   188→            <Group gap={4}>
   189→              <ExternalLink size={14} />
   190→              {item.sourceUrl}
   191→            </Group>
   192→          </Anchor>
   193→        )}
   194→
   195→        {/* Content */}
   196→        {item.contentText && (
   197→          <Card padding="md" radius="md" withBorder>
   198→            <Text fz="sm" style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }}>
   199→              {item.contentText}
   200→            </Text>
   201→          </Card>
   202→        )}
   203→
   204→        {/* Tags */}
   205→        <Box>
   206→          <Group justify="space-between" mb="xs">
   207→            <Text fw={600} fz="sm">
   208→              Tags
   209→            </Text>
   210→            {!editingTags ? (
   211→              <Button variant="subtle" size="xs" onClick={startEditTags}>
   212→                Edit
   213→              </Button>
   214→            ) : (
   215→              <Group gap="xs">
   216→                <Button
   217→                  variant="subtle"
   218→                  size="xs"
   219→                  onClick={() => setEditingTags(false)}
   220→                >
   221→                  Cancel
   222→                </Button>
   223→                <Button
   224→                  size="xs"
   225→                  onClick={saveTags}
   226→                  loading={tagResult.fetching}
   227→                >
   228→                  Save
   229→                </Button>
   230→              </Group>
   231→            )}
   232→          </Group>
   233→          {editingTags ? (
   234→            <TagsInput
   235→              value={tagValues}
   236→              onChange={setTagValues}
   237→              placeholder="Add tags..."
   238→            />
   239→          ) : (
   240→            <Group gap="xs">
   241→              {item.tags.length > 0 ? (
   242→                item.tags.map((tag) => (
   243→                  <Badge key={tag} variant="outline">
   244→                    {tag}
   245→                  </Badge>
   246→                ))
   247→              ) : (
   248→                <Text fz="sm" c="dimmed">
   249→                  No tags
   250→                </Text>
   251→              )}
   252→            </Group>
   253→          )}
   254→        </Box>
   255→
   256→        {/* Metadata */}
   257→        <Card padding="md" radius="md" withBorder>
   258→          <Stack gap="xs">
   259→            <Group gap="lg">
   260→              <Box>
   261→                <Text fz="xs" c="dimmed">Source</Text>
   262→                <Text fz="sm">{item.source}</Text>
   263→              </Box>
   264→              <Box>
   265→                <Text fz="xs" c="dimmed">Sensitivity</Text>
   266→                <Text fz="sm">{item.sensitivity.toLowerCase()}</Text>
   267→              </Box>
   268→            </Group>
   269→            <Group gap="lg">
   270→              <Box>
   271→                <Text fz="xs" c="dimmed">Captured</Text>
   272→                <Text fz="sm">{formatDate(item.capturedAt)}</Text>
   273→              </Box>
   274→              <Box>
   275→                <Text fz="xs" c="dimmed">Updated</Text>
   276→                <Text fz="sm">{formatDate(item.updatedAt)}</Text>
   277→              </Box>
   278→            </Group>
   279→          </Stack>
   280→        </Card>
   281→      </Stack>
   282→    </Container>
   283→  )
   284→}
   285→

1→import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest'

     3→import { MemoryRouter, Route, Routes } from 'react-router-dom'
     4→import { MantineProvider } from '@mantine/core'
     5→import { render } from '@testing-library/react'
     6→import { Provider as UrqlProvider } from 'urql'

    11→function renderItemDetail(id = 'test-id') {

    15→    <UrqlProvider value={mockClient as any}>
    16→      <MantineProvider theme={theme}>
    17→        <MemoryRouter initialEntries={[`/items/${id}`]}>
    18→          <Routes>
    19→            <Route path="/items/:id" element={<ItemDetail />} />
    20→          </Routes>
    21→        </MemoryRouter>
    22→      </MantineProvider>
    23→    </UrqlProvider>,
    24→  )
    25→}
    26→

    28→  it('renders without crashing', () => {
    29→    renderItemDetail()
    30→    // With mock client, component renders in loading or not-found state
    31→    expect(document.querySelector('.mantine-Container-root')).toBeTruthy()
    32→  })
    33→
    34→  it('shows not found when no data returned', () => {
    35→    renderItemDetail()
    36→    // Mock client doesn't return data, so eventually shows not found or loading
    37→    const notFound = screen.queryByText('Item not found.')
    38→    const loader = document.querySelector('.mantine-Loader-root')
    39→    // One of these states should be present
    40→    expect(notFound || loader).toBeTruthy()
    41→  })
    42→})

1→import { Client, cacheExchange, fetchExchange } from 'urql'
     2→import { authExchange } from '@urql/exchange-auth'
     3→import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores/authStore'
     4→
     5→export const urqlClient = new Client({
     6→  url: '/graphql',
     7→  exchanges: [
     8→    cacheExchange,
     9→    authExchange(async (utils) => ({
    10→      addAuthToOperation(operation) {
    11→        const token = useAuthStore.getState().getToken()
    12→        if (!token) return operation
    13→        return utils.appendHeaders(operation, {
    14→          Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,
    15→        })
    16→      },
    17→      didAuthError(error) {
    18→        return (
    19→          error.graphQLErrors.some(
    20→            (e) =>
    21→              e.extensions?.code === 'FORBIDDEN' || e.extensions?.code === 'UNAUTHENTICATED',
    22→          ) || error.response?.status === 401
    23→        )
    24→      },
    25→      async refreshAuth() {
    26→        useAuthStore.getState().logout()
    27→      },
    28→    })),
    29→    fetchExchange,
    30→  ],
    31→})
    32→

Let me also look at the `@urql/exchange-auth` situation for testing `urqlClient.ts`.

Now I have the full picture. Let me write all the web tests in parallel. The strategy:

1. **Enhanced mock client** in `test/mocks.ts` - add `createMockClientWithData` that uses `vi.fn().mockReturnValue` to produce urql-like source results
2. **Browse.test.tsx** - test data display, empty state, list view, pagination
3. **Search.test.tsx** - test results display, load more, empty results
4. **Login.test.tsx** - test form submission (success & error)
5. **Register.test.tsx** - test form submission
6. **ItemDetail.test.tsx** - test item display, not found, error states
7. **Capture.test.tsx** - test note tab form
8. **App.test.tsx** - test routing/loading state
9. **urqlClient.test.ts** - test auth exchange functions

Actually, instead of enhancing the mock client with wonka (which isn't available), I should mock the hooks at the module level. Let me take a simpler approach — mock `@/lib/graphql` to return controllable values.
